character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: A marooned sailor stranded for three years, surviving on goats, berries, and oysters. Wears tattered clothing fastened with odd materials and carries a brass-buckled belt. Claims to be rich and intends to help Jim.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: A sailor who encounters Ben Gunn, shares his voyage story, and seeks assistance. Expresses trust in Ben Gunn's ability to help.
